ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZ, JAZMIN N.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, JAZMIN N. $1,536.80 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,621.80, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAVE AGREED THAT DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE PAYMENTS OF THIS DEBT OF $70.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING JUNE 1, 2009. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $70.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUN-01-2009 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
